ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ ٱلْكِتٰبُ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allāh -

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ ٱلْكِتٰبُ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allāh -

ayahArabic: ذٰلِكَ ٱلْكِتٰبُ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ هُدًى لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Book about which there is no doubt, a guidance for those conscious of Allāh -

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them,

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them,

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them,

targetTranslation: they spend (referring to the believers mentioned in يُؤْمِنُونَ)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَيُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَمِمَّا رَزَقْنٰهُمْ يُنفِقُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who believe in the unseen, establish prayer, and spend out of what We have provided for them,

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

targetTranslation: it was sent down (object of يُؤْمِنُونَ - they believe in)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِمَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ وَمَآ أُنزِلَ مِن قَبْلِكَ وَبِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And who believe in what has been revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], and what was revealed before you, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are upon [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are upon [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are upon [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ عَلَىٰ هُدًى مِّن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Those are upon [right] guidance from their Lord, and it is those who are the successful.

targetTranslation: those who - points to specific people or things we're talking about
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who disbelieve - it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who disbelieve - it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

targetTranslation: equal, same (describing the situation of كَفَرُوا)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who disbelieve - it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

targetTranslation: you warn them (referring to الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا - those who disbelieved)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who disbelieve - it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who disbelieve - it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

targetTranslation: Allah (the one true God who sealed their hearts)
ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

targetTranslation: their hearts (referring to those who disbelieve)
ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

targetTranslation: their hearing (one of the senses Allah sealed)
ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

ayahArabic: خَتَمَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ سَمْعِهِمْ وَعَلَىٰٓ أَبْصٰرِهِمْ غِشٰوَةٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh has set a seal upon their hearts and upon their hearing, and over their vision is a veil. And for them is a great punishment.

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allāh and the Last Day," but they are not believers.

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allāh and the Last Day," but they are not believers.

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allāh and the Last Day," but they are not believers.

ayahArabic: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ مَن يَقُولُ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ وَمَا هُم بِمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And of the people are some who say, "We believe in Allāh and the Last Day," but they are not believers.

targetTranslation: they try repeatedly to trick (يَخْدَعُونَ in this ayah shows they keep doing this)
ayahArabic: يُخٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They [think to] deceive Allāh and those who believe, but they deceive not except themselves and perceive [it] not.

targetTranslation: Allah (object of يُخٰدِعُونَ - they try to deceive)
ayahArabic: يُخٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They [think to] deceive Allāh and those who believe, but they deceive not except themselves and perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: يُخٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They [think to] deceive Allāh and those who believe, but they deceive not except themselves and perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: يُخٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They [think to] deceive Allāh and those who believe, but they deceive not except themselves and perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: يُخٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They [think to] deceive Allāh and those who believe, but they deceive not except themselves and perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: يُخٰدِعُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَمَا يَخْدَعُونَ إِلَّآ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They [think to] deceive Allāh and those who believe, but they deceive not except themselves and perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

targetTranslation: they tell untruths (referring to the hypocrites mentioned in this ayah)
ayahArabic: فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ فَزَادَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مَرَضًا وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: In their hearts is disease, so Allāh has increased their disease; and for them is a painful punishment because they [habitually] used to lie.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Do not cause corruption on the earth," they say, "We are but reformers."

targetTranslation: you all make something become spoiled (referring to the hypocrites in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Do not cause corruption on the earth," they say, "We are but reformers."

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Do not cause corruption on the earth," they say, "We are but reformers."

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Do not cause corruption on the earth," they say, "We are but reformers."

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُصْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Do not cause corruption on the earth," they say, "We are but reformers."

ayahArabic: أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْسِدُونَ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Unquestionably, it is they who are the corrupters, but they perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْسِدُونَ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَشْعُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Unquestionably, it is they who are the corrupters, but they perceive [it] not.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

targetTranslation: believe! (all of you) (command in قِيلَ لَهُمْ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

targetTranslation: should we believe? (in response to ءَامِنُوا)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

targetTranslation: he believed/had faith (like ٱلنَّاسُ - the people)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ ءَامِنُوا۟ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلنَّاسُ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ كَمَآ ءَامَنَ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلسُّفَهَآءُ وَلٰكِن لَّا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Believe as the people have believed," they say, "Should we believe as the foolish have believed?" Unquestionably, it is they who are the foolish, but they know [it] not.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا لَقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا وَإِذَا خَلَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ شَيٰطِينِهِمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا مَعَكُمْ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when they meet those who believe, they say, "We believe"; but when they are alone with their evil ones, they say, "Indeed, we are with you; we were only mockers."

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا لَقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا وَإِذَا خَلَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ شَيٰطِينِهِمْ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا مَعَكُمْ إِنَّمَا نَحْنُ مُسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when they meet those who believe, they say, "We believe"; but when they are alone with their evil ones, they say, "Indeed, we are with you; we were only mockers."

targetTranslation: they believed (referring to the hypocrites when they meet the believers)

targetTranslation: with you all (referring to the hypocrites when speaking to their evil companions)

ayahEnglish: And when they meet those who believe, they say, "We believe"; but when they are alone with their evil ones, they say, "Indeed, we are with you; we were only mockers."

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: [But] Allāh mocks them and prolongs them in their transgression [while] they wander blindly.

targetTranslation: he makes fun (of بِهِمْ - of them)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: [But] Allāh mocks them and prolongs them in their transgression [while] they wander blindly.

targetTranslation: their extreme transgression (which اللَّهُ lets them continue in)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: [But] Allāh mocks them and prolongs them in their transgression [while] they wander blindly.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَهْزِئُ بِهِمْ وَيَمُدُّهُمْ فِى طُغْيٰنِهِمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
ayahEnglish: [But] Allāh mocks them and prolongs them in their transgression [while] they wander blindly.

targetTranslation: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of ٱشْتَرَوُا۟)
ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱشْتَرَوُا۟ ٱلضَّلٰلَةَ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ فَمَا رَبِحَت تِّجٰرَتُهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُهْتَدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Those are the ones who have purchased error [in exchange] for guidance, so their transaction has brought no profit, nor were they guided.

ayahArabic: أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱشْتَرَوُا۟ ٱلضَّلٰلَةَ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ فَمَا رَبِحَت تِّجٰرَتُهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُهْتَدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Those are the ones who have purchased error [in exchange] for guidance, so their transaction has brought no profit, nor were they guided.

targetTranslation: they exchanged for themselves (subject of رَبِحَت)

targetTranslation: it/she gained profit (referring to تِجٰرَتُهُمْ - their trade)

ayahEnglish: Those are the ones who have purchased error [in exchange] for guidance, so their transaction has brought no profit, nor were they guided.

ayahArabic: مَثَلُهُمْ كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِى ٱسْتَوْقَدَ نَارًا فَلَمَّآ أَضَآءَتْ مَا حَوْلَهُۥ ذَهَبَ ٱللَّهُ بِنُورِهِمْ وَتَرَكَهُمْ فِى ظُلُمٰتٍ لَّا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Their example is that of one who kindled a fire, but when it illuminated what was around him, Allāh took away their light and left them in darkness [so] they could not see.

ayahArabic: مَثَلُهُمْ كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِى ٱسْتَوْقَدَ نَارًا فَلَمَّآ أَضَآءَتْ مَا حَوْلَهُۥ ذَهَبَ ٱللَّهُ بِنُورِهِمْ وَتَرَكَهُمْ فِى ظُلُمٰتٍ لَّا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Their example is that of one who kindled a fire, but when it illuminated what was around him, Allāh took away their light and left them in darkness [so] they could not see.

targetTranslation: he sought to light (a نَارًا fire)

ayahEnglish: Their example is that of one who kindled a fire, but when it illuminated what was around him, Allāh took away their light and left them in darkness [so] they could not see.

targetTranslation: it (feminine) lit up (what was حَوْلَهُۥ around it)
ayahArabic: مَثَلُهُمْ كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِى ٱسْتَوْقَدَ نَارًا فَلَمَّآ أَضَآءَتْ مَا حَوْلَهُۥ ذَهَبَ ٱللَّهُ بِنُورِهِمْ وَتَرَكَهُمْ فِى ظُلُمٰتٍ لَّا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Their example is that of one who kindled a fire, but when it illuminated what was around him, Allāh took away their light and left them in darkness [so] they could not see.

targetTranslation: they see/perceive (referring to the hypocrites mentioned earlier in the ayah)

targetTranslation: completely deaf ones (subject of لَا يَرْجِعُونَ)
ayahArabic: صُمٌّۢ بُكْمٌ عُمْىٌ فَهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Deaf, dumb and blind - so they will not return [to the right path].

ayahArabic: صُمٌّۢ بُكْمٌ عُمْىٌ فَهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Deaf, dumb and blind - so they will not return [to the right path].

targetTranslation: blind ones (describing the same people as صُمٌّۢ 'deaf' and بُكْمٌ 'dumb')
ayahArabic: صُمٌّۢ بُكْمٌ عُمْىٌ فَهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Deaf, dumb and blind - so they will not return [to the right path].

ayahArabic: صُمٌّۢ بُكْمٌ عُمْىٌ فَهُمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Deaf, dumb and blind - so they will not return [to the right path].

ayahArabic: أَوْ كَصَيِّبٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فِيهِ ظُلُمٰتٌ وَرَعْدٌ وَبَرْقٌ يَجْعَلُونَ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِم مِّنَ ٱلصَّوٰعِقِ حَذَرَ ٱلْمَوْتِ وَٱللَّهُ مُحِيطٌۢ بِٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Or [it is] like a rainstorm from the sky within which is darkness, thunder and lightning. They put their fingers in their ears against the thunderclaps in dread of death. But Allāh is encompassing of the disbelievers.

targetTranslation: they make/put (referring to the hypocrites putting their fingers in their ears)
ayahArabic: أَوْ كَصَيِّبٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ فِيهِ ظُلُمٰتٌ وَرَعْدٌ وَبَرْقٌ يَجْعَلُونَ أَصٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِم مِّنَ ٱلصَّوٰعِقِ حَذَرَ ٱلْمَوْتِ وَٱللَّهُ مُحِيطٌۢ بِٱلْكٰفِرِينَ

targetTranslation: he almost does/he is on the verge of
ayahArabic: يَكَادُ ٱلْبَرْقُ يَخْطَفُ أَبْصٰرَهُمْ كُلَّمَآ أَضَآءَ لَهُم مَّشَوْا۟ فِيهِ وَإِذَآ أَظْلَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ قَامُوا۟ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَذَهَبَ بِسَمْعِهِمْ وَأَبْصٰرِهِمْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: The lightning almost snatches away their sight. Every time it lights [the way] for them, they walk therein; but when darkness comes over them, they stand [still]. And if Allāh had willed, He could have taken away their hearing and their sight. Indeed, Allāh is over all things competent.

ayahArabic: يَكَادُ ٱلْبَرْقُ يَخْطَفُ أَبْصٰرَهُمْ كُلَّمَآ أَضَآءَ لَهُم مَّشَوْا۟ فِيهِ وَإِذَآ أَظْلَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ قَامُوا۟ وَلَوْ شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ لَذَهَبَ بِسَمْعِهِمْ وَأَبْصٰرِهِمْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: The lightning almost snatches away their sight. Every time it lights [the way] for them, they walk therein; but when darkness comes over them, they stand [still]. And if Allāh had willed, He could have taken away their hearing and their sight. Indeed, Allāh is over all things competent.

targetTranslation: worship! (all of you) (command to the people mentioned in يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous -

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous -

targetTranslation: the one who (describes خَلَقَكُمْ - created you)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous -

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous -

targetTranslation: before you all (مِن قَبْلِكُمْ - from before you all)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous -

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: O mankind, worship your Lord, who created you and those before you, that you may become righteous -

targetTranslation: The One who (connects to جَعَلَ meaning 'The One who made')
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

targetTranslation: a spread-out thing (object of جَعَلَ - He made)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

targetTranslation: water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

targetTranslation: a provision (that Allah brought forth for you from the fruits)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

targetTranslation: rivals or equals (as objects of جَعَلَ)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

targetTranslation: you all know/understand (plural, addressing the disbelievers in this ayah)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فِرٰشًا وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بِنَآءً وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجَ بِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ رِزْقًا لَّكُمْ فَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [He] who made for you the earth a bed [spread out] and the sky a ceiling and sent down from the sky, rain and brought forth thereby fruits as provision for you. So do not attribute to Allāh equals while you know [that there is nothing similar to Him].

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ وَٱدْعُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if you are in doubt about what We have sent down [i.e., the Qur’ān] upon Our Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)], then produce a sūrah the like thereof and call upon your witnesses [i.e., supporters] other than Allāh, if you should be truthful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ وَٱدْعُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if you are in doubt about what We have sent down [i.e., the Qur’ān] upon Our Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)], then produce a sūrah the like thereof and call upon your witnesses [i.e., supporters] other than Allāh, if you should be truthful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ وَٱدْعُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if you are in doubt about what We have sent down [i.e., the Qur’ān] upon Our Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)], then produce a sūrah the like thereof and call upon your witnesses [i.e., supporters] other than Allāh, if you should be truthful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ وَٱدْعُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ

ayahEnglish: And if you are in doubt about what We have sent down [i.e., the Qur’ān] upon Our Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)], then produce a sūrah the like thereof and call upon your witnesses [i.e., supporters] other than Allāh, if you should be truthful.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُنتُمْ فِى رَيْبٍ مِّمَّا نَزَّلْنَا عَلَىٰ عَبْدِنَا فَأْتُوا۟ بِسُورَةٍ مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ وَٱدْعُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And if you are in doubt about what We have sent down [i.e., the Qur’ān] upon Our Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)], then produce a sūrah the like thereof and call upon your witnesses [i.e., supporters] other than Allāh, if you should be truthful.

ayahArabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَلَن تَفْعَلُوا۟ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: But if you do not - and you will never be able to - then fear the Fire, whose fuel is people and stones, prepared for the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَلَن تَفْعَلُوا۟ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: But if you do not - and you will never be able to - then fear the Fire, whose fuel is people and stones, prepared for the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَلَن تَفْعَلُوا۟ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: But if you do not - and you will never be able to - then fear the Fire, whose fuel is people and stones, prepared for the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَلَن تَفْعَلُوا۟ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: But if you do not - and you will never be able to - then fear the Fire, whose fuel is people and stones, prepared for the disbelievers.

targetTranslation: it (feminine) was prepared (referring to النَّارَ - the Fire)
ayahArabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَلَن تَفْعَلُوا۟ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: But if you do not - and you will never be able to - then fear the Fire, whose fuel is people and stones, prepared for the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: وَبَشِّرِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أَنَّ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ كُلَّمَا رُزِقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مِن ثَمَرَةٍ رِّزْقًا قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا ٱلَّذِى رُزِقْنَا مِن قَبْلُ وَأُتُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُتَشٰبِهًا وَلَهُمْ فِيهَآ أَزْوٰجٌ مُّطَهَّرَةٌ وَهُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And give good tidings to those who believe and do righteous deeds that they will have gardens [in Paradise] beneath which rivers flow. Whenever they are provided with a provision of fruit therefrom, they will say, "This is what we were provided with before." And it is given to them in likeness. And they will have therein purified spouses, and they will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: وَبَشِّرِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ أَنَّ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ كُلَّمَا رُزِقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مِن ثَمَرَةٍ رِّزْقًا قَالُوا۟ هٰذَا ٱلَّذِى رُزِقْنَا مِن قَبْلُ وَأُتُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُتَشٰبِهًا وَلَهُمْ فِيهَآ أَزْوٰجٌ مُّطَهَّرَةٌ وَهُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَسْتَحْىِۦٓ أَن يَضْرِبَ مَثَلًا مَّا بَعُوضَةً فَمَا فَوْقَهَا فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَيَقُولُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهٰذَا مَثَلًا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦ كَثِيرًا وَيَهْدِى بِهِۦ كَثِيرًا وَمَا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلْفٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Allāh is not timid to present an example - that of a mosquito or what is smaller than it. And those who have believed know that it is the truth from their Lord. But as for those who disbelieve, they say, "What did Allāh intend by this as an example?" He misleads many thereby and guides many thereby. And He misleads not except the defiantly disobedient,

targetTranslation: many people (who are led astray by this parable)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَسْتَحْىِۦٓ أَن يَضْرِبَ مَثَلًا مَّا بَعُوضَةً فَمَا فَوْقَهَا فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَيَقُولُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهٰذَا مَثَلًا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦ كَثِيرًا وَيَهْدِى بِهِۦ كَثِيرًا وَمَا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلْفٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Allāh is not timid to present an example - that of a mosquito or what is smaller than it. And those who have believed know that it is the truth from their Lord. But as for those who disbelieve, they say, "What did Allāh intend by this as an example?" He misleads many thereby and guides many thereby. And He misleads not except the defiantly disobedient,

targetTranslation: he causes to go astray (subject is اللَّهُ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَسْتَحْىِۦٓ أَن يَضْرِبَ مَثَلًا مَّا بَعُوضَةً فَمَا فَوْقَهَا فَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّهُ ٱلْحَقُّ مِن رَّبِّهِمْ وَأَمَّا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فَيَقُولُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهٰذَا مَثَلًا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦ كَثِيرًا وَيَهْدِى بِهِۦ كَثِيرًا وَمَا يُضِلُّ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا ٱلْفٰسِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, Allāh is not timid to present an example - that of a mosquito or what is smaller than it. And those who have believed know that it is the truth from their Lord. But as for those who disbelieve, they say, "What did Allāh intend by this as an example?" He misleads many thereby and guides many thereby. And He misleads not except the defiantly disobedient,

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَنقُضُونَ عَهْدَ ٱللَّهِ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مِيثٰقِهِۦ وَيَقْطَعُونَ مَآ أَمَرَ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦٓ أَن يُوصَلَ وَيُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخٰسِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who break the covenant of Allāh after contracting it and sever that which Allāh has ordered to be joined and cause corruption on earth. It is those who are the losers.

targetTranslation: they break/violate (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)

ayahArabic: كَيْفَ تَكْفُرُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَكُنتُمْ أَمْوٰتًا فَأَحْيٰكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: How can you disbelieve in Allāh when you were lifeless and He brought you to life; then He will cause you to die, then He will bring you [back] to life, and then to Him you will be returned.

targetTranslation: you all deny truth (addressing the disbelievers before بِٱللَّهِ)
ayahArabic: كَيْفَ تَكْفُرُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَكُنتُمْ أَمْوٰتًا فَأَحْيٰكُمْ ثُمَّ يُمِيتُكُمْ ثُمَّ يُحْيِيكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

ayahArabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ لَكُم مَّا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَسَوَّىٰهُنَّ سَبْعَ سَمٰوٰتٍ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: It is He who created for you all of that which is on the earth. Then He directed Himself to the heaven, [His being above all creation], and made them seven heavens, and He is Knowing of all things.

targetTranslation: he said (introduces what Allah said to the angels)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى جَاعِلٌ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ خَلِيفَةً قَالُوٓا۟ أَتَجْعَلُ فِيهَا مَن يُفْسِدُ فِيهَا وَيَسْفِكُ ٱلدِّمَآءَ وَنَحْنُ نُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِكَ وَنُقَدِّسُ لَكَ قَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I will make upon the earth a successive authority." They said, "Will You place upon it one who causes corruption therein and sheds blood, while we exalt You with praise and declare Your perfection?" He [Allāh] said, "Indeed, I know that which you do not know."

ayahArabic: وَعَلَّمَ ءَادَمَ ٱلْأَسْمَآءَ كُلَّهَا ثُمَّ عَرَضَهُمْ عَلَى ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ فَقَالَ أَنۢبِـُٔونِى بِأَسْمَآءِ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And He taught Adam the names - all of them. Then He showed them to the angels and said, "Inform Me of the names of these, if you are truthful."

targetTranslation: all of them (referring to الأسماء/the names)

targetTranslation: truthful ones (describing the angels if they really knew)
ayahArabic: وَعَلَّمَ ءَادَمَ ٱلْأَسْمَآءَ كُلَّهَا ثُمَّ عَرَضَهُمْ عَلَى ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ فَقَالَ أَنۢبِـُٔونِى بِأَسْمَآءِ هٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِن كُنتُمْ صٰدِقِينَ
ayahEnglish: And He taught Adam the names - all of them. Then He showed them to the angels and said, "Inform Me of the names of these, if you are truthful."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحٰنَكَ لَا عِلْمَ لَنَآ إِلَّا مَا عَلَّمْتَنَآ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Exalted are You; we have no knowledge except what You have taught us. Indeed, it is You who is the Knowing, the Wise."

targetTranslation: glory be to You (object of قَالُوا)
ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحٰنَكَ لَا عِلْمَ لَنَآ إِلَّا مَا عَلَّمْتَنَآ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Exalted are You; we have no knowledge except what You have taught us. Indeed, it is You who is the Knowing, the Wise."

ayahEnglish: They said, "Exalted are You; we have no knowledge except what You have taught us. Indeed, it is You who is the Knowing, the Wise."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحٰنَكَ لَا عِلْمَ لَنَآ إِلَّا مَا عَلَّمْتَنَآ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Exalted are You; we have no knowledge except what You have taught us. Indeed, it is You who is the Knowing, the Wise."

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ أَنۢبِئْهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ فَلَمَّآ أَنۢبَأَهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَأَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O Adam, inform them of their names." And when he had informed them of their names, He said, "Did I not tell you that I know the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth? And I know what you reveal and what you have concealed."

targetTranslation: inform them! (command to Adam about the angels)
ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ أَنۢبِئْهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ فَلَمَّآ أَنۢبَأَهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَأَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O Adam, inform them of their names." And when he had informed them of their names, He said, "Did I not tell you that I know the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth? And I know what you reveal and what you have concealed."

targetTranslation: he informed them (response to Allah's command أَنۢبِئْهُم)
ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ أَنۢبِئْهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ فَلَمَّآ أَنۢبَأَهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَأَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O Adam, inform them of their names." And when he had informed them of their names, He said, "Did I not tell you that I know the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth? And I know what you reveal and what you have concealed."

targetTranslation: I say (in a question to لَّكُمْ - to you all)

targetTranslation: you (all) hide (what you used to do)
ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰٓـَٔادَمُ أَنۢبِئْهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ فَلَمَّآ أَنۢبَأَهُم بِأَسْمَآئِهِمْ قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ غَيْبَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَأَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْتُمُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "O Adam, inform them of their names." And when he had informed them of their names, He said, "Did I not tell you that I know the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth? And I know what you reveal and what you have concealed."

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate before Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He refused and was arrogant and became of the disbelievers.

targetTranslation: all of you bow down! (command to angels)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate before Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He refused and was arrogant and became of the disbelievers.

targetTranslation: Iblis (as the subject being excepted from فَسَجَدُوٓا۟)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate before Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He refused and was arrogant and became of the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate before Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He refused and was arrogant and became of the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: وَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We said, "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat therefrom in [ease and] abundance from wherever you will. But do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We said, "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat therefrom in [ease and] abundance from wherever you will. But do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: freely and abundantly (describes eating from كُلَا)
ayahArabic: وَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We said, "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat therefrom in [ease and] abundance from wherever you will. But do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We said, "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat therefrom in [ease and] abundance from wherever you will. But do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We said, "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat therefrom in [ease and] abundance from wherever you will. But do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: you both come near (negative command - don't!)
ayahArabic: وَقُلْنَا يٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَكُلَا مِنْهَا رَغَدًا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We said, "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat therefrom in [ease and] abundance from wherever you will. But do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: they both were (referring to Adam and Eve)
ayahArabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But Satan caused them to slip out of it and removed them from that [condition] in which they had been. And We said, "Go down, [all of you], as enemies to one another, and you will have upon the earth a place of settlement and provision for a time."

ayahArabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But Satan caused them to slip out of it and removed them from that [condition] in which they had been. And We said, "Go down, [all of you], as enemies to one another, and you will have upon the earth a place of settlement and provision for a time."

ayahArabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But Satan caused them to slip out of it and removed them from that [condition] in which they had been. And We said, "Go down, [all of you], as enemies to one another, and you will have upon the earth a place of settlement and provision for a time."

targetTranslation: enemy (describing بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ - some of you to others)
ayahArabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ

targetTranslation: a place of settling (on الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
ayahArabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But Satan caused them to slip out of it and removed them from that [condition] in which they had been. And We said, "Go down, [all of you], as enemies to one another, and you will have upon the earth a place of settlement and provision for a time."

ayahArabic: فَأَزَلَّهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ عَنْهَا فَأَخْرَجَهُمَا مِمَّا كَانَا فِيهِ وَقُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: But Satan caused them to slip out of it and removed them from that [condition] in which they had been. And We said, "Go down, [all of you], as enemies to one another, and you will have upon the earth a place of settlement and provision for a time."

targetTranslation: Adam (subject of فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ - then he received)
ayahArabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ ءَادَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمٰتٍ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Then Adam received from his Lord [some] words, and He accepted his repentance. Indeed, it is He who is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful.

ayahArabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ ءَادَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمٰتٍ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Then Adam received from his Lord [some] words, and He accepted his repentance. Indeed, it is He who is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful.

targetTranslation: words (that Adam received from his Lord)
ayahArabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ ءَادَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمٰتٍ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Then Adam received from his Lord [some] words, and He accepted his repentance. Indeed, it is He who is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful.

ayahArabic: فَتَلَقَّىٰٓ ءَادَمُ مِن رَّبِّهِۦ كَلِمٰتٍ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Then Adam received from his Lord [some] words, and He accepted his repentance. Indeed, it is He who is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful.

targetTranslation: we said (this is the main verb telling what happened)
ayahArabic: قُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ مِنْهَا جَمِيعًا فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَن تَبِعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
ayahEnglish: We said, "Go down from it, all of you. And when guidance comes to you from Me, whoever follows My guidance - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

targetTranslation: descend, all of you! (command to group)
ayahArabic: قُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ مِنْهَا جَمِيعًا فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَن تَبِعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ

distractors: And We gave understanding of it

ayahArabic: قُلْنَا ٱهْبِطُوا۟ مِنْهَا جَمِيعًا فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَن تَبِعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
ayahEnglish: We said, "Go down from it, all of you. And when guidance comes to you from Me, whoever follows My guidance - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those who disbelieve and deny Our signs - those will be companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally."

targetTranslation: those (far away, referring to the disbelievers who denied Our signs)

targetTranslation: Israel (being addressed in 'O Children of Israel')
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَوْفُوا۟ بِعَهْدِىٓ أُوفِ بِعَهْدِكُمْ وَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor which I have bestowed upon you and fulfill My covenant [upon you] that I will fulfill your covenant [from Me], and be afraid of [only] Me.

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَوْفُوا۟ بِعَهْدِىٓ أُوفِ بِعَهْدِكُمْ وَإِيَّاىَ فَٱرْهَبُونِ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor which I have bestowed upon you and fulfill My covenant [upon you] that I will fulfill your covenant [from Me], and be afraid of [only] Me.

ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor which I have bestowed upon you and fulfill My covenant [upon you] that I will fulfill your covenant [from Me], and be afraid of [only] Me.

ayahArabic: وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِمَآ أَنزَلْتُ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا مَعَكُمْ وَلَا تَكُونُوٓا۟ أَوَّلَ كَافِرٍۭ بِهِۦ وَلَا تَشْتَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِى ثَمَنًا قَلِيلًا وَإِيَّاىَ فَٱتَّقُونِ
ayahEnglish: And believe in what I have sent down confirming that which is [already] with you, and be not the first to disbelieve in it. And do not exchange My signs for a small price, and fear [only] Me.

ayahEnglish: And believe in what I have sent down confirming that which is [already] with you, and be not the first to disbelieve in it. And do not exchange My signs for a small price, and fear [only] Me.

targetTranslation: you all mix/confuse (don't mix up الْحَقَّ with بِٱلْبٰطِلِ)
ayahArabic: وَلَا تَلْبِسُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ بِٱلْبٰطِلِ وَتَكْتُمُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And do not mix the truth with falsehood or conceal the truth while you know [it].

ayahArabic: وَلَا تَلْبِسُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ بِٱلْبٰطِلِ وَتَكْتُمُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ وَأَنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And do not mix the truth with falsehood or conceal the truth while you know [it].

ayahArabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱرْكَعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱلرَّاكِعِينَ
ayahEnglish: And establish prayer and give zakāh and bow with those who bow [in worship and obedience].

ayahArabic: أَتَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَتَنسَوْنَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ تَتْلُونَ ٱلْكِتٰبَ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do you order righteousness of the people and forget yourselves while you recite the Scripture? Then will you not reason?

ayahArabic: أَتَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَتَنسَوْنَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ تَتْلُونَ ٱلْكِتٰبَ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do you order righteousness of the people and forget yourselves while you recite the Scripture? Then will you not reason?

ayahArabic: أَتَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَتَنسَوْنَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ تَتْلُونَ ٱلْكِتٰبَ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do you order righteousness of the people and forget yourselves while you recite the Scripture? Then will you not reason?

targetTranslation: then do you not? (connected to تَعْقِلُونَ)

ayahArabic: أَتَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَتَنسَوْنَ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ تَتْلُونَ ٱلْكِتٰبَ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do you order righteousness of the people and forget yourselves while you recite the Scripture? Then will you not reason?

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَظُنُّونَ أَنَّهُم مُّلٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are certain that they will meet their Lord and that they will return to Him.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَظُنُّونَ أَنَّهُم مُّلٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are certain that they will meet their Lord and that they will return to Him.

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَظُنُّونَ أَنَّهُم مُّلٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are certain that they will meet their Lord and that they will return to Him.

targetTranslation: their Lord (referring to ٱلَّذِينَ - those who)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَظُنُّونَ أَنَّهُم مُّلٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are certain that they will meet their Lord and that they will return to Him.

targetTranslation: those who are returning (subject of يَظُنُّونَ)
ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَظُنُّونَ أَنَّهُم مُّلٰقُوا۟ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ رٰجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who are certain that they will meet their Lord and that they will return to Him.

targetTranslation: Israel (being addressed in يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ - O Children of Israel)
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor that I have bestowed upon you and that I preferred you over the worlds [i.e., peoples].

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor that I have bestowed upon you and that I preferred you over the worlds [i.e., peoples].

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor that I have bestowed upon you and that I preferred you over the worlds [i.e., peoples].

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor that I have bestowed upon you and that I preferred you over the worlds [i.e., peoples].

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor that I have bestowed upon you and that I preferred you over the worlds [i.e., peoples].

targetTranslation: I favored/preferred you all (referring to بَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ)
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرٰٓءِيلَ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتِىَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَأَنِّى فَضَّلْتُكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: O Children of Israel, remember My favor that I have bestowed upon you and that I preferred you over the worlds [i.e., peoples].

targetTranslation: a day (object of وَٱتَّقُوا - fear/be mindful of)
ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

targetTranslation: it is accepted (something that شَفٰعَةٌ/intercession will not be)
ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

targetTranslation: any intercession (in relation to لَّا يُقْبَلُ - will not be accepted)
ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

targetTranslation: is taken/accepted (passive present tense, negated by لَا)
ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ يَوْمًا لَّا تَجْزِى نَفْسٌ عَن نَّفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُقْبَلُ مِنْهَا شَفٰعَةٌ وَلَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا عَدْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And fear a Day when no soul will suffice for another soul at all, nor will intercession be accepted from it, nor will compensation be taken from it, nor will they be aided.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ وَفِى ذٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We saved you [i.e., your forefathers] from the people of Pharaoh, who afflicted you with the worst torment, slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ وَفِى ذٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We saved you [i.e., your forefathers] from the people of Pharaoh, who afflicted you with the worst torment, slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord.

targetTranslation: Pharaoh (possessed by آلِ - the family/people of)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ وَفِى ذٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We saved you [i.e., your forefathers] from the people of Pharaoh, who afflicted you with the worst torment, slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord.

targetTranslation: they afflict you all (referring to Children of Israel)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ وَفِى ذٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We saved you [i.e., your forefathers] from the people of Pharaoh, who afflicted you with the worst torment, slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord.

targetTranslation: evil treatment (object of يَسُومُونَ - they were inflicting)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ نَجَّيْنٰكُم مِّنْ ءَالِ فِرْعَوْنَ يَسُومُونَكُمْ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يُذَبِّحُونَ أَبْنَآءَكُمْ وَيَسْتَحْيُونَ نِسَآءَكُمْ وَفِى ذٰلِكُم بَلَآءٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَظِيمٌ

targetTranslation: they slaughter repeatedly/violently (subject: آلِ فِرْعَوْنَ - people of Pharaoh)

targetTranslation: your women (being acted upon by يَسْتَحْيُونَ - they let live)

ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We saved you [i.e., your forefathers] from the people of Pharaoh, who afflicted you with the worst torment, slaughtering your [newborn] sons and keeping your females alive. And in that was a great trial from your Lord.

targetTranslation: we split (the sea for بِكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ فَرَقْنَا بِكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ فَأَنجَيْنٰكُمْ وَأَغْرَقْنَآ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We parted the sea for you and saved you and drowned the people of Pharaoh while you were looking on.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ فَرَقْنَا بِكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ فَأَنجَيْنٰكُمْ وَأَغْرَقْنَآ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We parted the sea for you and saved you and drowned the people of Pharaoh while you were looking on.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ فَرَقْنَا بِكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ فَأَنجَيْنٰكُمْ وَأَغْرَقْنَآ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We parted the sea for you and saved you and drowned the people of Pharaoh while you were looking on.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ فَرَقْنَا بِكُمُ ٱلْبَحْرَ فَأَنجَيْنٰكُمْ وَأَغْرَقْنَآ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We parted the sea for you and saved you and drowned the people of Pharaoh while you were looking on.

targetTranslation: we made a mutual promise (to مُوسَىٰٓ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ وٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظٰلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We made an appointment with Moses for forty nights. Then you took [for worship] the calf after him [i.e., his departure], while you were wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ وٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظٰلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We made an appointment with Moses for forty nights. Then you took [for worship] the calf after him [i.e., his departure], while you were wrongdoers.

ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We made an appointment with Moses for forty nights. Then you took [for worship] the calf after him [i.e., his departure], while you were wrongdoers.

targetTranslation: a night (specifying the forty in أَرْبَعِينَ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ وٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظٰلِمُونَ

targetTranslation: you all took/adopted (subject of وَأَنتُمْ ظٰلِمُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ وٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظٰلِمُونَ

ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We made an appointment with Moses for forty nights. Then you took [for worship] the calf after him [i.e., his departure], while you were wrongdoers.

targetTranslation: those who act unfairly (plural, describing أنتم)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ وٰعَدْنَا مُوسَىٰٓ أَرْبَعِينَ لَيْلَةً ثُمَّ ٱتَّخَذْتُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ وَأَنتُمْ ظٰلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We made an appointment with Moses for forty nights. Then you took [for worship] the calf after him [i.e., his departure], while you were wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ عَفَوْنَا عَنكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذٰلِكَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We forgave you after that so perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ عَفَوْنَا عَنكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذٰلِكَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We forgave you after that so perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ عَفَوْنَا عَنكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذٰلِكَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We forgave you after that so perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ عَفَوْنَا عَنكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذٰلِكَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We forgave you after that so perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ وَٱلْفُرْقَانَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We gave Moses the Scripture and criterion that perhaps you would be guided.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ وَٱلْفُرْقَانَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We gave Moses the Scripture and criterion that perhaps you would be guided.

targetTranslation: you all find the way (referring to the people being addressed in لَعَلَّكُمْ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتٰبَ وَٱلْفُرْقَانَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We gave Moses the Scripture and criterion that perhaps you would be guided.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يٰقَوْمِ إِنَّكُمْ ظَلَمْتُمْ أَنفُسَكُم بِٱتِّخَاذِكُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ فَتُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ بَارِئِكُمْ فَٱقْتُلُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ذٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ عِندَ بَارِئِكُمْ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when Moses said to his people, "O my people, indeed you have wronged yourselves by your taking of the calf [for worship]. So repent to your Creator and kill yourselves [i.e., the guilty among you]. That is best for [all of] you in the sight of your Creator." Then He accepted your repentance; indeed, He is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يٰقَوْمِ إِنَّكُمْ ظَلَمْتُمْ أَنفُسَكُم بِٱتِّخَاذِكُمُ ٱلْعِجْلَ فَتُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ بَارِئِكُمْ فَٱقْتُلُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ذٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ عِندَ بَارِئِكُمْ فَتَابَ عَلَيْكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلتَّوَّابُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

targetTranslation: He (referring to Allah as the subject of التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ)

So repent to your Creator and kill yourselves [i.e., the guilty among you]. That is best for [all of] you in the sight of your Creator." Then He accepted your repentance; indeed, He is the Accepting of Repentance, the Merciful.

targetTranslation: you all said (addressing the Children of Israel speaking to Moses)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةً فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّاعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when you said, "O Moses, we will never believe you until we see Allāh outright"; so the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

targetTranslation: we will believe (after لَن meaning 'will not')
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةً فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّاعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when you said, "O Moses, we will never believe you until we see Allāh outright"; so the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةً فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّاعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when you said, "O Moses, we will never believe you until we see Allāh outright"; so the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object of نَرَى/we see)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةً فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّاعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when you said, "O Moses, we will never believe you until we see Allāh outright"; so the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

targetTranslation: openly/plainly (describing how they wanted to see Allah)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةً فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّاعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when you said, "O Moses, we will never believe you until we see Allāh outright"; so the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْتُمْ يٰمُوسَىٰ لَن نُّؤْمِنَ لَكَ حَتَّىٰ نَرَى ٱللَّهَ جَهْرَةً فَأَخَذَتْكُمُ ٱلصَّاعِقَةُ وَأَنتُمْ تَنظُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when you said, "O Moses, we will never believe you until we see Allāh outright"; so the thunderbolt took you while you were looking on.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ بَعَثْنٰكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ مَوْتِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We revived you after your death that perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ بَعَثْنٰكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ مَوْتِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We revived you after your death that perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ بَعَثْنٰكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ مَوْتِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We revived you after your death that perhaps you would be grateful.

targetTranslation: you all show gratitude (referring to the Children of Israel being addressed)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ بَعَثْنٰكُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ مَوْتِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then We revived you after your death that perhaps you would be grateful.

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

targetTranslation: we provided you all (referring to the Children of Israel being addressed in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: وَظَلَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْغَمَامَ وَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنٰكُمْ وَمَا ظَلَمُونَا وَلٰكِن كَانُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We shaded you with clouds and sent down to you manna and quails, [saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you." And they wronged Us not - but they were [only] wronging themselves.

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ٱدْخُلُوا۟ هٰذِهِ ٱلْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا۟ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًا وَٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْبَابَ سُجَّدًا وَقُولُوا۟ حِطَّةٌ نَّغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطٰيٰكُمْ وَسَنَزِيدُ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when We said, "Enter this city [i.e., Jerusalem] and eat from it wherever you will in [ease and] abundance, and enter the gate bowing humbly and say, 'Relieve us of our burdens [i.e., sins].' We will [then] forgive your sins for you, and We will increase the doers of good [in goodness and reward]."

ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ٱدْخُلُوا۟ هٰذِهِ ٱلْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا۟ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًا وَٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْبَابَ سُجَّدًا وَقُولُوا۟ حِطَّةٌ نَّغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطٰيٰكُمْ وَسَنَزِيدُ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

targetTranslation: in a state of prostration (describing how they enter)

We will [then] forgive your sins for you, and We will increase the doers of good [in goodness and reward]."

targetTranslation: your mistakes (referring to the people being addressed)
ayahArabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا ٱدْخُلُوا۟ هٰذِهِ ٱلْقَرْيَةَ فَكُلُوا۟ مِنْهَا حَيْثُ شِئْتُمْ رَغَدًا وَٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْبَابَ سُجَّدًا وَقُولُوا۟ حِطَّةٌ نَّغْفِرْ لَكُمْ خَطٰيٰكُمْ وَسَنَزِيدُ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

We will [then] forgive your sins for you, and We will increase the doers of good [in goodness and reward]."

ayahArabic: فَبَدَّلَ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ قَوْلًا غَيْرَ ٱلَّذِى قِيلَ لَهُمْ فَأَنزَلْنَا عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ رِجْزًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَفْسُقُونَ
ayahEnglish: But those who wronged changed [those words] to a statement other than that which had been said to them, so We sent down upon those who wronged a punishment [i.e., plague] from the sky because they were defiantly disobeying.

targetTranslation: they wronged (referring to those who changed the word)

ayahArabic: وَإِذِ ٱسْتَسْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ فَقُلْنَا ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْحَجَرَ فَٱنفَجَرَتْ مِنْهُ ٱثْنَتَا عَشْرَةَ عَيْنًا قَدْ عَلِمَ كُلُّ أُنَاسٍ مَّشْرَبَهُمْ كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And [recall] when Moses prayed for water for his people, so We said, "Strike with your staff the stone." And there gushed forth from it twelve springs, and every people [i.e., tribe] knew its watering place. "Eat and drink from the provision of Allāh, and do not commit abuse on the earth, spreading corruption."

ayahArabic: وَإِذِ ٱسْتَسْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ فَقُلْنَا ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْحَجَرَ فَٱنفَجَرَتْ مِنْهُ ٱثْنَتَا عَشْرَةَ عَيْنًا قَدْ عَلِمَ كُلُّ أُنَاسٍ مَّشْرَبَهُمْ كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِ ٱللَّهِ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
